heading: Useless ordnance material: disposition of proceeds on sale
label: 8763 Useless ordnance material: disposition of proceeds on sale
text: The net proceeds of sales of useless ordnance material by the Department of the Navy shall be covered into the Treasury.
notes: Historical and Revision NotesRevised sectionSource (U.S. Code)Source (Statutes at Large)7543.50 U.S.C. 74, (last 24 words of 5th par.).Jan. 22, 1923, ch. 2842 Stat. 1142The words “as miscellaneous receipts” are omitted as surplusage.
Amendments2018— renumbered as this section.Pub. L. 115–232section 7543 of this title
